title: How to set box.com link to files column?
excerpt: Hello! I would like to set many box.com shared links to the Monday.com board record in the column with the type “Files”. I see such an ability in the web interface but I don’t see such a way to do it from GraphQL API. Th…

posts.author: Roman_Dubrovin (Roman Dubrovin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I would like to set many box.com shared links to the Monday.com board record in the column with the type “Files”. I see such an ability in the web interface but I don’t see such a way to do it from GraphQL API. The only thing I see is to upload the file to Monday.com but it is not what I need. The customer requirement is to store all files in box.com so I have links and I would like to set them on the board.
